name: startup_ecosystem
description: A multi-sided networking and marketplace platform connecting Founders, Mentors, Incubators, Accelerators, and Investors.
context: The StartUp Ecosystem app facilitates business connections, fundraising, mentorship, and access to startup resources within a disaggregated, open ecosystem.

startup_venture.description: Details about a startup venture, including stage, sector, and metrics.

startup_challenge.description: A post by a Founder seeking advice or solutions.

vendor_product.description: Digital assets like templates, research reports, or partner vendor tools.

ai_biz_score.description: AI-generated open metric/assessment tool for startup readiness.

connection_request.description: Request for a business connection between users.
